calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-08-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Jonathan Harriman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff C&H International, Inc.
Larry Leung, manager at C&H NIternational, Inc., was placed under oath and examined.
Defaults was entered against defendant Globetrotter Travel, dba Vanessa's Travel, January 23, 2008.
Amended default was entered against defendant Gustavo Arriaza was entered on July 18, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, April 8, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff C&H International, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendants Globetrotter Travel, dba Vanessa's Travel, and Gustavo Arriaza as follows:

Damages/Principal - $24,041.02.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney's Fees - $4,400.00.
Costs - $554.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $28,995.52.
